calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Continued To Apr-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Dean R. Prober, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bosco Credit, LLC.
Maranda Felton, Judgment Processor for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Honesto R. Visaya, a/k/a Honesto Visaya.
Default was entered against defendant on January 5, 2010..
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bosco Credit, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Honesto R. Visaya, a/k/a Honesto Visaya as follows:

Damages/Principal - $37,992.72.
Prejudgment Interest - $11,053.30.
Attorney Fees - $550.00.
Late Fees - $2,220.50.
Costs - $455.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $52,271.52.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
